description:
## Deep Component Audit — hx-grid

**Component directory:** `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-grid/`
**Sub-components:** hx-grid-item

### wc-mcp Tools — USE THESE
- `score_component`, `get_component`, `analyze_accessibility`, `list_css_parts`, `list_slots`, `get_design_tokens`
- **Report wc-mcp bugs to `/Volumes/Development/booked/wc-tools` board.**

### Audit Scope
1. **Design Tokens** — `--hx-` tokens. Gap, column count, breakpoints. Responsive.
2. **Accessibility** — WCAG 2.1 AA. Semantic grid (not table). Content reflow at zoom. Reading order.
3. **Functionality** — Column count. Responsive breakpoints. Grid gap. Item spanning (col-span, row-span). Auto-flow. Alignment.
4. **TypeScript** — Strict. No `any`.
5. **CSS/Styling** — Shadow DOM. CSS Grid. Responsive. CSS Parts. Container queries.
6. **CEM Accuracy** — Both grid + grid-item documented.
7. **Tests** — 80%+ coverage. Columns. Responsive. Spanning. Alignment.
8. **Storybook** — Various columns. Responsive demo. Spanning. Nested.
9. **Drupal Compatibility** — Layout builder. Views grid. Twig-friendly.
10. **Portability** — CDN-ready.

### Deliverable
Detailed audit report. Fix CRITICAL+HIGH. Document rest.
title: Deep Audit v2: hx-grid
